sutta: 1 once the exalted 1 dwelt near zavati and jeter grove in anatap indica spa and there he addressed the monks saying monks lord they replied and the exalted 1 said there are monks these 5 checks hindrances which overspread the mind which weaken inside what 5 sensual desire monks is a check a hindrance which over spreads the mind which weakens inside ill will [Music] is a hindrance sloth and topper restlessness and worry doubt monks is a check a hindrance which over spreads the mind which weakens inside these monks are the 5 czech's hindrances monks that among verily without being rid of those 5 checks hindrances which overspread the mind which weakened inside without strength and weak and insight or wisdom shall know his own good shall know another's good shall know the good of both or shall realize the excellence of knowledge and insight proper to aryans which goes beyond human state that cannot be monks suppose in the case of a mountain stream winding here and there swiftly flowing taking all along with it a man were to open watercourses into it from both sides then indeed monks the flow in midstream would be disturbed swirled about and diverted nor would the stream wind here and there not flow swiftly nor take all along with it even so amongst that among without being rid of these 5 checks hindrances which over spread the mind which weakened inside without strength and weak and insight shall know his own good or another's or the good of both or shall realize the excellence of knowledge and insight proper to aryans which goes beyond human state that cannot be monks that among being rid of these 5 checks hindrances which overspread the mind which weaken inside strong and with insight shall know his own good shall know another's good shall know the good of both or shall realize the excellence of knowledge and insight proper to aryans which goes beyond the human state that surely shall be monks suppose in the case of a mountain stream winding here and there swiftly flowing taking all along with it a man were to close the watercourses on both sides of it then indeed monks the flow in mid-stream would not be disturbed swirled about or diverted but the stream would wind here and there flow swiftly or forward taking all along with it even so amongst that among rid of these 5 checks hindrances which overspread the mind which weaken insight strong and with insight shall know his own good or another's or the good of both or shall realize the excellence of knowledge and insight proper to aryans which goes beyond the human state that surely shall be and that's the end of the suta
commentary: this utah is about the 5 hindrances pancha nivarana the first 1 is sensual desire second 1 is ill will or anger and then sloth and topper restlessness and worry doubt these are the 5 hindrances they're called hindrances because they hinder us from having wisdom they hinder us from seeing things as they really are [Music] so here the buddha is saying without being rid of these 5 checks these hindrances which overspread the mind which weakened inside among shall know his own good or another's good or the good of both or realize the excellence of knowledge and insight which goes beyond the human state that that cannot be so you see it's very clear here that uh to get inside now to get wisdom to go beyond the human state the manosa dhamma is the human state we have to get rid of the 5 hindrances that is why in meditation there are 2 parts to meditation always the first part is called the samata practice which helps us to get rid of the 5 hindrances actually when we attain that samadhi the hindrances goes away naturally without a conscious restraint this was mentioned in 1 of the sutas earlier that i had read if you all remember so in the majima nikaya suta number 108 the verbal ananda was asked what kind of meditation is praised by the buddha and what kind of meditation is not praised by the buddha and then the venable ananda said the kind of meditation where the 5 hindrances are abandoned that kind of meditation is praised by the buddha if you practice a kind of meditation where the 5 hindrances are not abandoned that is certainly not the type of buddhist meditation because it's not praised by the buddha so you have to always remember in meditation we have to get rid of the 5 hindrances before we can attain insight before we can know our own good or another's good or realize the excellence of knowledge and insight proper to aryans we have to get rid of the 5 influences in the majima nikaya and sanghita nikaya it is said that when 1 attains jhana 1 attains the 5 um factors of jhana and then 1 abandons the 5 hindrances so jhana is definitely a buddhist meditation it is called 1 of these uttari manosa dhamma that which surpasses the human state so uh here you should know the importance of jhana and samadhi in meditation because it helps us to get rid of the 5 hindrances without if we were not rid of 5 hindrances no inside would arise then the next futa is
